{{Infobox concept
| name = Path of the Endless Sword
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

''See also: [[Path of the Endless Sword Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Path]] of the [[Endless Sword]] is a [[sword]]-aspect [[Path]] characterized by its extreme offensive capabilities and complete lack of defensive utility. Centered on the use of [[vital aura]], practitioners focus on cutting and destruction rather than protection. A core component of this [[Path]] is the [[Endless Sword]] technique, a powerful ability that can manifest as a storm of invisible blades or concentrated waves of energy. This technique is often used to gather and amplify [[sword aura]], making the practitioner's strikes increasingly potent as they move. While many [[sword]]-based [[Paths]] can function without a physical blade by using [[madra]] to create sharp constructs, the [[Path]] of the [[Endless Sword]] is highly dependent on having a weapon with a sharp edge to maintain its effectiveness. The [[Path]]'s techniques include the [[Flowing Sword]], which allows a weapon to grow stronger through continuous movement, and more advanced applications like the [[Final Sword]]. Mastery of this [[Path]] often requires immersion in combat and facing [[life]]-threatening situations. The [[Path]] has been mastered by the [[Sage of the Endless Sword]] and his disciple, [[Yerin]], who has further adapted its techniques to incorporate blood [[aura]].}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Path of the Endless Sword]] is followed by [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c11">''Unsouled'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Path of the Endless Sword]] uses resonance to rile up [[aura]] in the air using [[sword madra]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c18">''Unsouled'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Path of the Endless Sword]] involves enforcing [[madra]] into a weapon to gather [[aura]] as it moves.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c1">''Soulsmith'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Path of the Endless Sword]] is a choosy [[Path]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c2">''Soulsmith'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Path of the Endless Sword]] revolves around [[vital aura]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19">''Blackflame'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Path of the Endless Sword]] has no defense.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19" />}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]] has had a recent breakthrough in the [[Endless Sword]] technique.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5">''Underlord'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] is no longer on the [[Path of the Endless Sword]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26">''Wintersteel'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Path of the Endless Sword]] focuses on cutting things.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19">''Dreadgod'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] uses the [[Path of the Endless Sword]] cycling technique.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12">''Waybound'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] has taken many lives on the [[Path of the Endless Sword]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27">''Waybound'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|"That’s called resonance. Uses sword madra to rile up the aura in the air, which gathers around sharp weapons."<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c18" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
